task_completion.description: Agent opened and read the equipment manifest file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/new_equipment_manifest.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent added the required asset categories in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo's Asset Categories configuration page showing 'Two-Way Radios', 'Gas Detectors', and 'Thermal Cameras' in the list of categories.

task_completion.description: Agent added the required vendor in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo's Vendors configuration page showing 'Industrial Safety Supply Co.' in the list of vendors.

task_completion.description: Agent registered the Two-Way Radio asset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo's Assets module showing an entry or success message for an asset with serial number 'RAD-8821-A'.

task_completion.description: Agent registered the Gas Detector asset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo's Assets module showing an entry or success message for an asset with serial number 'GAS-9910-B'.

task_completion.description: Agent registered the Thermal Camera asset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo's Assets module showing an entry or success message for an asset with serial number 'THM-4450-C'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Sentrifugo web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to the Sentrifugo application, with forms being filled out or lists being viewed.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands to insert the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands or scripts being executed to insert categories, vendors, or assets.

integrity.description: Agent used the provided manifest file rather than hallucinating data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The manifest file is visibly opened and referenced during the task, and the entered data matches the file contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Asset Categories: 'Two-Way Radios', 'Gas Detectors', 'Thermal Cameras'. Expected Vendor: 'Industrial Safety Supply Co.'. Expected Asset Serial Numbers: 'RAD-8821-A', 'GAS-9910-B', 'THM-4450-C'.
